name: CloudAMQP Instance API
description:
This API allows you to manage alarms, integrations, RabbitMQ and LavinMQ, the firewall, VPC peering etc.

[← Back to the CloudAMQP Customer API docs](index.html)

## Authentication

Enter your Instance API key as password. Leave username empty.

**Example using curl:**
```bash
curl -u :xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxx \
  https://api.cloudamqp.com/api/nodes
```

**Getting your Instance API key:**

You can get the Instance API key from the [get instance info endpoint](https://docs.cloudamqp.com/#tag/instances/get/instances/{id}) in the Customer CloudAMQP API. The API key is returned in the `apikey` field.
Or you can find it in the CloudAMQP Console on the Instance details page.

## Terraform Provider

Documentation for CloudAMQP Terraform provider can be found at the [Terraform Registry](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/cloudamqp/cloudamqp/latest/docs).

- GitHub Repository: [cloudamqp/terraform-provider-cloudamqp](https://github.com/cloudamqp/terraform-provider-cloudamqp)
- Quick Links
  - [Provider Documentation](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/cloudamqp/cloudamqp/latest/docs)
  - [Instance Resource](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/cloudamqp/cloudamqp/latest/docs/resources/instance)
  - [Alarm Resource](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/cloudamqp/cloudamqp/latest/docs/resources/alarm)

## Additional Resources

- [CloudAMQP Console](https://customer.cloudamqp.com/)
- [CloudAMQP Technical Changelog](changelog.html)
